swap_instructions: To add a new repertoire line: 1) Add a new entry under current_repertoire with all fields populated. 2) Move the displaced entry to legacy_repertoire. 3) Update the specialist code in wrapper/. 4) Run the screening and proof matrix. 5) Update claims_manifest.json proof_status.
